examples: Unfilled positions number several million countrywide.
They sent out questionnaires to one hundred schools countrywide.
Armed robbery and abduction have been on the increase countrywide.
The trustee of at least 530 Countrywide trusts, Bank of New York Mellon, was less impressed.
During the real estate boom Countrywide created hundreds of securitization trusts, selling certificates backed by residential mortgage loans.
